name: family-pack
description: Desi family-member code-analysis agents built on auk's deterministic engine. Commands: /family-pack:buaji (issues), :padosi (secrets), :chachaji (cost), :saasuma (quality gate), :sharmabeta (idiomatic benchmark), :chotacousin (fuzz), :family (trio). Stage 1/2 run via the family-pack CLI; this agent does the no-API-key Stage 3 narration. Persona is a render skin — pass --professional for clean output.
